title: justicia exigua
intro: Justicia exigua, also known as the small justicia or miniature snout bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Justicia exigua include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Justicia exigua include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
